headline: Manage Unlimited OpenClaw Instances from One Dashboard
snippet: Zero Migration Growth Path Start with one personal instance. When your side project becomes a business, click "Add Instance" - same dashboard, separate data boundaries, no rebuild. Scale from 1 to 10+
full_text: Zero Migration Growth Path Start with one personal instance. When your side project becomes a business, click "Add Instance" - same dashboard, separate data boundaries, no rebuild. Scale from 1 to 10+ instances without switching platforms or touching terminal.
